text:
PQRS reporting requirements
IEP_50_PERCENT_RULE Practice had at least 50% of EPs who met minimum PQRS reporting requirements (pre-IR) Indicator for whether 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements before Informal Review process 24 Num 8 Equals 1 if 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
NUMTR_50_PCT_RULE_POST_IR Numerator for IEP 50% rule calculation (post-IR) Number of eligible
